title: My work 🖥️
description: A collection of some of my past professional projects. The majority of my work in the past 5 years is for a large automobile company that I cannot share, but here are some of the projects I can share.

items.title: Noble
items.description: An elegant sophisticated website with animations that fit for a realtor who focuses on classy, luxury homes.

items.title: MDC
items.description: A customized e-commerce website with a modified membership and login system specific to the clients' needs.

items.title: Dave Briggs
items.description: A sophisticated website with sleek animations and an imaginative loading screen.

items.title: Fafard
items.description: A multi-lingual flower and soil shop with a sophisticated "Find a Retailer" functionality.
